apiInfo.title: One-Time Withdrawal API (Full Surrender and Partial Withdrawal(including RMD))
apiInfo.description: API to submit one-time withdrawals (Partial, Full, and RMD) on a policy. Supported transaction types: oneTimePartialWithdrawal, fullSurrender.

fieldInstances.description: Unique policy number(1 to 30 characters).
Identifier returned in the Location header from the Withdrawal request POST.
Technical message with specific error details for developers identify the type of error quickly.
Server-assigned identifier for the withdrawal request.
Current status of the withdrawal request.

A structured error code that uniquely identifies the type of error. This can follow a hierarchical format: - `<domain>`: The logical domain (e.g., "gateway") - `<category>`: The error category (e.g., "client" or "server") - `<subcategory>`: A specific error identifier (e.g., "badrequest", "timeout")
HTTP status code associated with this error
Message with specific error details.
Time when the error occurred

fieldInstances.constraints: enum=[COSTOFINSURANCE, EXPENSECHARGE, UNITEXPENSECHARGE, RIDERCHARGE, SURRENDERCHARGE, WITHDRAWALCHARGE]

fieldInstances.description: unique identification code. Optional; Required only when policyNumber is not globally unique.

enum=[CHECKING, SAVINGS, CREDITCARDACCOUNT, DEBITCARDACCOUNT, BROKERAGEACCOUNT, CERTIFICATEOFDEPOSITACCOUNT]

Unique policy number(1 to 30 characters).
Optional firm/linkage identifier (preferred location per IRI).

Indicates the business rules that apply to the partial one-time withdrawal, such as regular amount, free withdrawal, interest-only, or RMD. For one-time RMD transactions, select transactionSubType as RMD.
Optional client-supplied identifier to trace the request.
Server-assigned identifier for the withdrawal request.
Current status of the withdrawal request.

endpoints.description: Retrieve the withdrawal request resource created by POST.
endpoints.responseCodesAndMediaTypes: 200: application/json; 400: application/json; 401: application/json; 403: application/json; 404: application/json; 429: application/json; 500: application/json

201: application/json; 400: application/json; 401: application/json; 403: application/json; 404: application/json; 405: application/json; 406: application/json; 409: application/json; 413: application/json; 415: application/json; 422: application/json; 429: application/json; 500: application/json; 502: application/json; 503: application/json; 504: application/json

endpoints.description: Submit a one-time partial withdrawal. Select rmd as a transactionSubType for One Time RMD request.
endpoints.responseCodesAndMediaTypes: 201: application/json; 400: application/json; 401: application/json; 403: application/json; 404: application/json; 405: application/json; 406: application/json; 409: application/json; 413: application/json; 415: application/json; 422: application/json; 429: application/json; 500: application/json; 502: application/json; 503: application/json; 504: application/json

schemas.name: Charges
schemas.description: Details of fees and deductions applied to the transaction

schemas.name: FullSurrenderRequest
schemas.description: Request to perform a full surrender.

schemas.name: FundDistribution
schemas.description: Fund distribution details for the withdrawal

schemas.name: GetWithdrawalRequestStatus
schemas.description: Withdrawal request status resource created by the GET.

schemas.name: OneTimePartialWithdrawalRequest
schemas.description: Request to perform a one-time partial withdrawal.

schemas.name: Party
schemas.description: The parties object represents the policy parties relevant to the withdrawal (owners, annuitants, beneficiaries, etc.), along with their identity, relationship, and payout instructions.

schemas.name: PayeeOrBeneficiary
schemas.description: The payeeOrBeneficiary object represents how the withdrawal proceeds are distributed and to whom. It includes payment form, allocation rules for each payee.

schemas.name: Producer
schemas.description: Information about the producer submitting the request

schemas.name: RmdInfo
schemas.description: RMD details specific to partial one-time withdrawals.

schemas.name: TaxWithholdingInstruction
schemas.description: List of tax withholding instruction entries

schemas.name: TransactionAmounts
schemas.description: Details of financial amounts associated with the transaction

schemas.name: TransactionAmountsFull
schemas.description: Details of financial amounts associated with the transaction

schemas.name: WithdrawalRequestStatus
schemas.description: Withdrawal request status resource created by the POST.
